evals.prompt: Run a Lighthouse audit on my Next.js landing page at http://localhost:3000 and fix any performance issues you find. The project is at /Users/apple/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/Antigravity Skills/alabs-lp
evals.expected_output: Local mode triggered. Scores printed before and after. Code changes applied (e.g. next/image priority, dynamic imports, cache headers). Summary table showing score delta.

evals.prompt: Can you audit https://analytixlabs.co.in and tell me what's hurting its performance score?
evals.expected_output: Live mode triggered (no local codebase provided). Lighthouse runs against the live URL. A structured recommendations report is produced with prioritised fixes — no code edits made. Key metrics (LCP, TBT, CLS) shown.

evals.prompt: Run lighthouse on https://careersuccess.analytixlabs.co.in — the local source is at /Users/apple/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/Antigravity Skills/alabs-lp. Apply whatever fixes you can.
evals.expected_output: Live URL audited. User also provided local codebase, so skill pivots to apply code fixes locally. Recommendations report generated + code changes made. User told to redeploy to see score improvement on live URL.

evals.prompt: My site scores 62 on Lighthouse performance. Can you check what's wrong and fix the image optimisation and LCP issues? localhost:3000
evals.expected_output: Local mode. LCP image identified and given priority prop, tags replaced with next/image, sizes prop added. Before/after score comparison shown.
